name: USS Griswold (DE 7)
events: 9 Aug 1944 During 9 and 10 August 1944, USS Baya (Cdr. A.H. Holtz, USN), conducted exercises off Pearl Harbor together with USS Canfield (Lt.Cdr. P.E. Cherry, USNR), USS Greiner (Lt.Cdr. L.H. Kiser, USN), USS Griswold (Lt.Cdr. M.C. Walley, USNR), USS Rall (Lt.Cdr. C.B. Taylor, USNR), USS Gar (Lt.Cdr. M. Ferrara, USN) and USS Grouper (Cdr. F.H. Wahlig, USN). These exercises included night exercises.

15 Aug 1944 From 15 to 17 August 1944, USS Seahorse (T/Capt. C.W. Wilkins, USN), USS Whale (T/Cdr. J.B. Grady, USN) and USS Segundo (T/Cdr. J.D. Fulp, Jr., USN) conducted exercises off Pearl Harbor with an incoming convoy. During these exercises they were escorted by USS Lovering (Lt.Cdr. E.P. Bayley, USNR, with COMCORTDIV 10, Cdr. G.B. Coale, USNR on board) and USS Griswold (Lt.Cdr. M.C. Walley, USNR).

29 Aug 1944 From 29 August 1944 to 31 August 1944, USS Bergall (T/Cdr. J.M. Hyde, USN), USS Icefish (T/Cdr. R.W. Peterson, USN), USS Sea Devil (T/Cdr. R.E. Styles, USN) conducted exercises off Pearl Harbor with an incoming convoy. During these exercises they were escorted by USS Griswold (Lt.Cdr. M.C. Walley, USNR) and USS Greiner (Lt.Cdr. L.H. Kiser, USN) which joined the escort of the convoy during the exercises. The incoming convoy was convoy SP 8 which had departed San Francisco on 22 August. The composition of this convoy is currently not known to us. It was escorted my the minesweeper USS Sentry (Lt.Cdr. T.R. Fonick, USNR). The convoy arrived at Pearl Harbor (and possibly Honolulu) on 31 August 1944.

12 May 1945 USS Icefish (T/Cdr. R.W. Peterson, USN) and USS Spadefish (T/Cdr. W.J. Germershausen, Jr., USN) conducted exercises off Guam with USS Griswold (Lt.Cdr. L. Cresap, Jr., USNR), USS Steele (T/Cdr. M.E. Dennett, USN) and USS Greenlet (Lt.Cdr. J.T. Hodgson, Jr., USN).
